description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden toolbox with a rectangular form and a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing two internal trays that pivot outward for easy access. The wood is dark-stained with visible grain and signs of wear, giving it a rustic, well-used appearance. Metal hardware, including hinges and a latch, reinforce the structure and provide secure closure. The interior contains grooming tools such as a straight razor and a comb, as well as a round metallic token or coin. The trays are divided into compartments, suitable for organizing small tools or accessories. The overall craftsmanship suggests durability and a classic, utilitarian design.
description: A dark wooden toolbox with pivoting trays, metal hardware, and grooming tools inside, featuring a rustic, worn finish.
description_view_0: The toolbox is open, showing two pivoting trays, a comb, a straight razor, and a coin, with the lid propped up.
description_view_1: The closed side of the toolbox is visible, with the comb partially protruding and the wood grain and wear marks prominent.
description_view_2: A side view highlights the open trays, the straight razor, and the coin, emphasizing the depth and construction of the box.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the open toolbox, clearly displaying the trays, comb, straight razor, and the interior compartment layout.
attribute_handle_type: No dedicated carrying handle is visible; the box is likely carried by grasping the sides or the lid edge.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single metal clasp latch on the front, rectangular in shape, with a simple flip mechanism and no visible keyhole.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Two pivoting internal trays divided into smaller compartments, with a main lower compartment beneath; all trays appear fixed in place.
